stories.title: The Last Rice Field
stories.author: Joke Lin + Claude
stories.summary: 2075, when the last manual rice field faces being swallowed by smart farms, an old farmer and his AI assistant have a conversation about memory and the future.

stories.title: Hermes at the Convenience Store
stories.author: Joke Lin + GPT-4
stories.summary: At 3AM in a convenience store, cashier Xiao Lin meets a strange customer claiming to be the Greek messenger god.

stories.title: Letter to 2050
stories.author: Joke Lin + Gemini
stories.summary: A rural development researcher writes to their future self, about villages, technology, memory and hope.
